data.revised_prompt:
Create a 1024x1792 vertical seamless long-track image for a children's pinyin racing web game.

Scene: a bright futuristic skybridge highway above clouds and a clean sci-fi city. View from behind and slightly above. A believable straight road goes upward through the whole image. Three clear lanes, realistic road texture, guardrails, blue light strips, daylight. The top and bottom edges should tile smoothly in a vertical scrolling game.

No car, no vehicles, no characters, no pinyin cards, no signs, no UI, no text, no letters, no Chinese characters, no pinyin, no numbers, no fake writing, no logos, no watermark. Keep the center road readable and uncluttered.
